subcodes.first_line: O 'Andalib! Praised be God that thou hast attained unto service, remembrance and glorification. Thou hast been mentioned by the Most Exalted Pen with that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عندلیب لله الحمد بنصرت و خدمت و ذکر و ثنا فائز شدی قد زکرت من القلم الاعلی بما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for teaching, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
